masthead_subtitle: A LOGBOOK OF MONSTERS SIGHTED & SWORN-TO
prestige_button_label: Strike Out for the Newsstand Age
prestige_confirm_body: Lore Inheritance carries forward. The next age has steam, photographs, and newsprint — and it remembers every monster we ever saw off the bow.
reveal_placeholder_text: Something larger surfaces just beyond the bow.
prestige_ready_toast: Ship's ready. Set sail when you are.
